title: Internationalization + community translations (constituent-facing materials)
context: Constituent-facing materials (case status messages, informational disclaimers, how-to guides) may need translation to serve multilingual communities in the pilot jurisdiction. Translations are community-contributed and reviewed per language. No legal or duty/compliance content is translated without a credentialed expert reviewer for the target language; only informational/navigational content is in scope for community translation.
objective: Internationalize the constituent-facing UI strings and produce community-reviewed translations of constituent-facing informational materials for the languages most needed in the pilot jurisdiction, reviewed per language before shipping.
acceptanceCriteria: Constituent-facing UI strings externalized into translation files (i18n framework in place)
Translations for target language(s) cover: case status messages, informational disclaimers, how-to guides, and the informational-not-legal-advice label
Each language translation reviewed by a fluent community reviewer before shipping
No legal, duty, or compliance content is included in community-translated materials without a credentialed expert reviewer for the target language
Translation files are CC-BY-4.0 and attribution preserved
output: Internationalized constituent-facing materials with community-reviewed translations for the target language(s), covering UI strings, informational disclaimers, and how-to guides -- not legal or duty content.
